Calibration Objective Wrappers

Source: R/calibration_loglikelihood.R, R/calibration_reproduction_numbers_r0.R, R/calibration_reproduction_numbers_r1.R, and 1 more
calibration_objectives.Rd

These functions provide package-facing wrappers for the original parameterisation and for reparameterisations based on R01, R02, and R0.

Usage

negative_loglikelihood_original_scale(
  par,
  observation_times,
  observed_cases,
  initial_state,
  time_grid,
  fixed_parameters
)

negative_loglikelihood_r0(
  par,
  observation_times,
  observed_cases,
  initial_state,
  time_grid,
  fixed_parameters
)

negative_loglikelihood_r01(
  par,
  observation_times,
  observed_cases,
  initial_state,
  time_grid,
  fixed_parameters
)

negative_loglikelihood_r02(
  par,
  observation_times,
  observed_cases,
  initial_state,
  time_grid,
  fixed_parameters
)

Arguments

par

Numeric vector with betaH in the first position and the wrapper-specific second parameter in the second position: betaM for negative_loglikelihood_original_scale(), R01 for negative_loglikelihood_r01(), R02 for negative_loglikelihood_r02(), or R0 for negative_loglikelihood_r0().

observation_times

Observation times on the simulation grid.

observed_cases

Two-column matrix of observed classical and hemorrhagic case counts.

initial_state

Named numeric state vector used by run_model().

time_grid

Numeric vector of solver times.

fixed_parameters

Named numeric vector containing the fixed model parameters.

Value

A scalar negative Poisson log-likelihood.

A scalar negative Poisson log-likelihood.

A scalar negative Poisson log-likelihood.

A scalar negative Poisson log-likelihood.
